title: carduus carpetanus subsp. braun-blanquetii
intro: Carduus carpetanus subsp. braun-blanquetii is a subspecies of the Carduus carpetanus plant, also known as Braun-Blanquet's cardoon thistle, a type of flowering plant in the thistle family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Carduus carpetanus subsp. braun-blanquetii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions.
